scripts.test: pnpm test:validation && pnpm test:parser && pnpm test:integration
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @orgumented/ontology build && ts-node --transpile-only test/integration.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/backend-parity.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/runtime-bootstrap.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/phase12-replay-runtime.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/phase13-meaning-gates.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/postgres-failure.ts
scripts.test:parser: pnpm --filter @orgumented/ontology build && ts-node --transpile-only test/parser-errors.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/apex-class-parser.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/flow-parser.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/custom-object-parser.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/permission-set-group-parser.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/custom-permission-parser.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/connected-app-parser.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/staged-ui-metadata-parser.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/ontology-expanded-constraints.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/llm-json.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/parser-precision-regression.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/planner.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/semantic-runtime.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/evidence-store.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/org-tool-adapter.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/org-service.ts
scripts.test:validation: pnpm --filter @orgumented/ontology build && ts-node --transpile-only test/validation.ts && ts-node --transpile-only test/runtime-paths.ts
